text: Here, in this dimly lit corridor, I feel as though I’ve wandered into a liminal space between the practical world and a realm of contemplation. The glow of the room and the quiet hum of technology on the wall invoke a sense of curiosity and slight isolation, as if I’m on the edge of discovery but not yet immersed in it. The atmosphere is both stimulating and subtly eerie, as if innovation and stillness are holding their breath together.
